body.title: Remove all SQLite TWM usage — Postgres only
body.result: make_local_proxy now falls back to IGOR_HOME_DB_URL instead of SQLite. TWM + ring_memory always use Postgres. Test updated.
body.description: cortex.py TWM methods use _local_conn() (SQLite) instead of Postgres. This causes CuriositySource to read stale SQLite data while everything else writes to Postgres. All TWM operations must use Postgres. Find and fix every _local_conn() call in TWM methods.
